items.name: Brown Striped Cap
items.description: For those days when you want to just blend in.

items.name: The Agonizingly Ugly Yellow Baseball Cap
items.description: Ick! This hat looks awful! Who would want to be caught dead wearing one of these? If you have any sense at all, you'll spend your money on something else.

items.name: Valentine's Day 2012 Cap
items.description: "I poured my heart out... it evaporated."

items.name: Mathzilla
items.description: Solve this problem:  Johnny has three math books.  If Sammy takes Johnny's....RAWR Mathzilla eat math!  Om nom nom....

items.name: Nightgorer
items.description: The night is dark and full of terrors.

items.name: Eggrachnophobia
items.description: Win this egg in ROBLOX's 2013 Egg Hunt!  Start hunting here - http://www.roblox.com/Roblox-Egg-Hunt-2013-place?id=110132408

items.name: Gobble Gobble
items.description: Win this by bringing the most turkeys back to the dinner table in the ROBLOX Thanksgiving Turkey Hunt!!!

items.name: Operator Cap
items.description: "Hello operator/ Can you give me number nine? / Can I see you later? / Will you give me back my dime?"

items.name: Hip Grey Beanie
items.description: Because some mornings you just don't feel like brushing your hair!

items.name: Ne'Kotikoz Warrior Helmet
items.description: Corrupted technology has destroyed their land, but not their spirits.

items.name: Smiley Helmet - Tai Verdes
items.description: Bring the happy vibes anywhere you go.

items.name: Euro Skate Helmet
items.description: Skate for life.  Skate for all.

items.name: 2009 Graduation Cap
items.description: Limited edition graduation cap! For all 2009 graduates!

items.name: RBX Neon Cap
items.description: You take skating seriously.  Xtremely seriously.

items.name: Bright Beanie
items.description: Bright and cheery - perfect for every casual occasion.  Because they don't make beanies for fancy occasions.  At least I've never seen anyone pull it off.

items.name: Deluxe Military Helmet
items.description: Goggles to protect your eyes, helmet to protect your head, world class training to protect your life.

items.name: Base War Helmet
items.description: The land needs you!!

items.name: Air Force Helmet
items.description: “The Navy can lose us the war, but only the Air Force can win it.” -Winston Churchill

items.name: Pink Winter Cap
items.description: If Robloxians had ears, this hat would keep them warm.

items.name: Cheetar
items.description: He was hungry.  You were standing there.  It's a no brainer.

items.name: Norse Scout Helmet
items.description: Slower than Odin's ravens, but more expendable.

items.name: Lucky Clover Cap
items.description: With this lucky cap, the luck o' the Irish will be with you all year long!

items.name: Tasteless Baseball Cap
items.description: Take me out to the ballgame. OH. You're wearing THAT. Nevermind.

items.name: Demon Cap
items.description: The darkness within has been unleashed!

items.name: Lightning Baseball Cap
items.description: This team isn't just hot, they're on fire!

items.name: Worldwide Traveler Cap
items.description: You've seen it all, you bought the tee shirt, and you bought the cap.

items.name: WWI Military Helmet
items.description: If you drop your weapon, you can throw your helmet at them.

items.name: The Commissioner
items.description: He doesn't tolerate nonsense.  So knock it off.  This item came out of the Commissioner's Gift of Commissions on December 18th, 2012.

items.name: Martian Space Helmet
items.description: The Martians are coming!  The Martians are coming!  Get ready!

items.name: Canadian Baseball Cap
items.description: Happy Canada Day! Bonne anniversaire!
